[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 110000000 2
2 110001000 3
3 001001000 2
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a
